---
title: "Publications"
description: "Journal and conference publications, posters, and technical reports."
toc: true
date-modified: ""
---

For the most up-to-date list, see my [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=e1Qpc9gAAAAJ&hl=pt-BR) profile.

## Journal articles

- Mantovani, L. Q., Schaub, H.<br>
<span id="shielded-drl-JAIS-2026"></span>
**Safety and Performance Considerations in Shielded Autonomous Spacecraft Tasking**<br>
*Journal of Aerospace Information Systems* (under review)<br>
[Code](https://avslab.github.io/bsk_rl/examples/training_with_shield.html)  

- Stephenson, M., Mantovani, L. Q., Schaub, H.<br>
<span id="intent-JAIS-2026"></span>
**Scalable Multi-Agent Earth Observation Tasking with Single-Agent Policies**<br>
*Journal of Aerospace Information Systems* (under review)

- Mantovani, L. Q., Schaub, H. (2026)<br>
<span id="training-enhancements-JAIS-2026"></span>
**Improving Robustness of Autonomous EarthObserving Spacecraft Using Training Environment Enhancements**<br>
*Journal of Aerospace Information Systems*<br>
[DOI](https://doi.org/10.2514/1.I011697) · [Code](https://avslab.github.io/bsk_rl/examples/curriculum_learning.html)

- Stephenson, M., Mantovani, L. Q., Schaub, H. (2025).<br>
**Learning Policies for Autonomous Earth-Observing Satellite Scheduling over Semi-MDPs**<br>
*Journal of Aerospace Information Systems*<br>
[DOI](https://doi.org/10.2514/1.I011649)

- Mantovani, L. Q., Santos, W. G., Cardoso-Ribeiro, F. L., Santos, J. C. (2022).<br>
**Influence of thrust modulation on a satellite with flexible non-latching booms**<br>
*Journal of the Brazilian Society of Mechanical Sciences and Engineering*<br>
[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1007/s40430-022-03887-z)

- Mantovani, L. Q., Santos, W. G., Cardoso-Ribeiro, F. L., Costa, L. E. V. L. (2022).<br>
**Impact of non-latching booms on a nanosatellite attitude control system**<br>
*Aerospace Science and Technology*<br>
[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ast.2021.107298)

- Portella, K. M., Schinestzki, W. N, Sehnem, R. M., Luz, L. B., Mantovani, L. Q., et al. (2020).<br>
**Satellite Attitude Control Using Control Moment Gyroscopes**<br>
*Journal of Aerospace Technology and Management* (online)<br>
[DOI](https://doi.org/10.5028/jatm.cab.1156)

- Slongo, A.G., Moraes, D.D., Mantovani, L. Q., et al. (2020).<br>
**Handling Qualities Analysis of an Unmanned Aircraft Vehicle for Agricultural Spraying**<br>
*Journal of Aerospace Technology and Management* (online)<br>
[DOI](https://doi.org/10.5028/jatm.cab.1150)

- Slongo, A. G., Silva, A. L., Moraes, D. D., Martos, J. F. A., Mantovani, L. Q., et al. (2020).<br>
**Preliminary Study of Launch and Orbit of a CubeSat Using a Modified VSB-30 Launcher Vehicle**<br>
*Journal of Aerospace Technology and Management* (online)<br>
[DOI](https://doi.org/10.5028/jatm.cab.1157)

## Conference papers

- Mantovani, L. Q., Schaub, H. (2026).<br>
<span id="shielded-drl-GNC-2026"></span>
**Shielding Against The Unsafe: Evaluation Of Shielded Deep Reinforcement Learning Training Approaches For Autonomous Spacecraft**<br>
AAS Rocky Mountain GN&C Conference, Breckenridge, Colorado, Jan. 31– Feb. 4.<br>
[Code](https://avslab.github.io/bsk_rl/examples/training_with_shield.html)

- Mantovani, L. Q., Schaub, H. (2025).<br>
<span id="shielded-drl-IWPSS-2025"></span>
**Performance Evaluation of Shielded Neural Networks for Autonomous Agile Earth Observing Satellites**<br>
International Workshop on Planning & Scheduling for Space, Toulouse, France, April 28–30.

- Mantovani, L. Q., Schaub, H. (2025).<br>
**Improving Robustness of Autonomous Spacecraft Scheduling Using Curriculum Learning**<br>
AAS Rocky Mountain GN&C Conference, Breckenridge, CO, January 31 – February 5.<br>
[Code](https://avslab.github.io/bsk_rl/examples/curriculum_learning.html)

- Stephenson, M., Mantovani, L. Q., Cheval, Q., Schaub, H. (2025).<br>
**Quantifying The Optimality Of A Distributed Rl-Based Autonomous Earth-Observing Constellation**<br>
AAS Rocky Mountain GN&C Conference, Breckenridge, CO, January 31 – February 5

- Mantovani, L. Q., Nagano, Y., Schaub, H. (2024).<br>
**Reinforcement Learning For Satellite Autonomy Under Different Cloud Coverage Probability Observations**<br>
AAS Astrodynamics Specialist Conference, Broomfield, CO, Aug. 11–15.<br>
[Code](https://avslab.github.io/bsk_rl/examples/cloud_environment.html) · [Code](https://avslab.github.io/bsk_rl/examples/cloud_environment_with_reimaging.html)

- Stephenson,M.,Mantovani, L. Q.,Schaub,H.(2024).<br>
**“Intent Sharing For Emergent Collaboration In Autonomous Earth Observing Constellations”**<br>
AAS Rocky Mountain GN&C Conference, Breckenridge, CO, Feb. 2–7

- Stephenson, M., Mantovani, L. Q., Phillips, S., Schaub, H. (2024).<br>
**Using Enhanced Simulation Environments to Accelerate Reinforcement Learning for Long-Duration Satellite Autonomy**<br>
AIAA Science and Technology Forum and Exposition (SciTech), Orlando, Florida, Jan. 8–12.<br>
[DOI](https://doi.org/10.2514/6.2024-0990)

- Mantovani, L. Q., Santos, W.G., Cardoso-Ribeiro, F.L.(2020).<br>
**Vibration analysis of the CubeSat SPORT boom’s through a flexible multibody model**<br>
Ibero-Latin American Congress on Computational Methods in Engineering (XLI CILAMCE)

- Slongo, A. G., Mantovani, L. Q., Schuch, N. J., Dur˜ao, O. S. C., Mattielo-Francisco, F., Silva, A. L., Legg, A. P., Burger, E. E. (2020).<br>
**NANOSATC-BR3 concept design using model-based systems engineering (MBSE)**<br>
5th IAA Conference on University Satellite Missions and CubeSat Workshop, Rome, Italy

- Slongo,A.G.,Moraes,D.D.,Mantovani, L.Q.,Venturini,M.S.(2019).<br>
**Análise das qualidades de voo de uma aeronave remotamente pilotada para pulverização agrícola [Analysis of the flying qualities of a remotely piloted aircraft for agricultural spraying]**<br>
2º Congresso Aeroespacial Brasileiro, Santa Maria, Brazil

- Schinestzki, W. N., Luz, L. B., Sacco, R. R., Portella, K. M., Sehnem, R. M., Sartori, T. K., Mantovani, L. Q., Paglione, P. (2019).<br>
**Controle de atitude de satélite utilizando giroscópios de controle de momento [Satellite attitude control using control moment gyroscopes]**<br>
2º Congresso Aeroespacial Brasileiro, Santa Maria, Brazil

- Slongo, A. G., Moraes, D. D., Mantovani, L. Q., Venturini, M. S. (2019).<br>
**Desenvolvimento de uma aeronave remotamente pilotada para pulverização agrícola [Development of an remotely piloted aicraft for agricultural spraying]**<br>
2º Congresso Aeroespacial Brasileiro, Santa Maria, Brazil.

- Slongo, A. G., Moraes, D. D., Mantovani, L. Q., Venturini, M. S. (2019).<br>
**Definição de requisitos de projeto para um veículo aéreo não tripulado (VANT) para pulverização agrícola [Definition of project requirements for an unmanned aircraft for agricultural spraying]**<br>
2º Congresso Aeroespacial Brasileiro, Santa Maria, Brazil

- Slongo, A. G., Moraes, D. D., Portella, K. M., Mantovani, L. Q., Venturini, M. S., Silva, A. L. (2019).<br>
**Estudo preliminar de lançamento e órbita do CubeSat NANOSATC-BR3 utilizando o ve´ıculo lan¸cador VSB-30 modificado [Preliminary study of the launch and orbit of the NANOSATC-BR3 CubeSat using a modified VSB-30 launch vehicle]**<br>
2º Congresso Aeroespacial Brasileiro, Santa Maria, Brazil

- Mantovani, L. Q., Signor, F., Santos, K. M., Paglione, P. (2018).<br>
**Modelagem e simulação de um sistema de controle para satélites com atuação de rodas de reação e bobinas magnéticas[Modeling and simulation of a satellite control system actuated by reaction wheels and magnetorquers]**<br>
1º Congresso Aeroespacial Brasileiro, Foz do Iguaçu, Brazil

- Portella, K. M., Moraes, D. D., Gatelli, M. L. C., Venturini, M. S., Mantovani, L. Q., et al. (2018).<br>
**Comparação entre estratégias de controle por regulador linear quadrático e controle por mapeamento exponencial aplicado a um sistema de pêndulo invertido [Comparison between Linear Quadratic Regulator and Exponential Mapping control strategies for an inverted pendulum system]**<br>
11th Seminar on Power Electronics and Control, Santa Maria, Brazil

- Mantovani, L. Q., Marques, R. P., Muller, A., Barreto, E. X., Silva, A. L., Dur˜ao, O. S. C., et al. (2017).<br>
**NANOSATC-BR2: 2-unit CubeSat power analysis, solar flux prediction, design and 3D printing of the flight model from the UFSM & INPE NANOSATCBR CubeSats development program**<br>
4th IAA Conference on University Satellite Missions and CubeSat Workshop, Rome, Italy

- Marques, R. P., Couto, A. P., Mantovani, L. Q., Manica, T. R., Muller, A. (2017).<br>
**CubeSats: utilidades e aplicações na indústria aeroespacial para a defesa brasileira [CubeSats: Uses and applications in the aerospace industry for Brazilian defense]**<br>
III Seminário Internacional de Defesa (SEMINDE), Santa Maria, Brazil

- Mantovani, L. Q., Piaz, M. L., Slongo, A. G., Marques, R. P., Muller, A., et al. (2016).<br>
**Applicable solution for optimizing critical points on nanosatellite missions – NANOSATCBR CubeSats development program**<br>
2º IAA Latin American CubeSat Workshop, Florianópolis, Brazil

## Conference posters

- Mantovani, L. Q., Prats, D. H., Stephenson, M., Schaub, H. (2025).<br>
**Enabling Spacecraft Autonomy Using Deep Reinforcement Learning**<br>
Rocky Mountain Workshop on Control and Autonomy, Boulder, CO, July 11

- Mantovani, L. Q., Santos, W. G., Cardoso-Ribeiro, F. L. (2021)<br>
**Overview of the Impact of Flexible Non-Latching Booms on a Small Satellite During Attitude and Orbit Maneuvers**<br>
XX Colóquio Brasileiro de Dinâmica Orbital (online), December 6–10.

- Mantovani, L. Q., Santos, W. G., Cardoso-Ribeiro, F. L. (2021).<br>
**Use of the ISS vacuum and zero-gravity environment for determining small satellites’ deployable structures parameters**<br>
The ISS Research and Development Conference (online), August 16–18

- Mantovani, L. Q., Schuch, N. J., Durão, O. S. C. (2018).<br>
**Estudo de órbita e mecânica espacial aplicado a nanossatélites: Programa NANOSATC-BR, desenvolvimento de CubeSats [Orbit and space mechanics study applied to nanosatellites: NANOSATC-BR Program, 5 CubeSat development]**<br>
VII Simpósio Brasileiro de Geofísica e Aeronomia, Santa Maria, Brazil, November 5–9

- Mantovani, L. Q., Schuch, N. J., Durão, O. S. C., Marques, R. P., Silva, A. L. (2017).<br>
**Estudo de órbita e mecânica espacial aplicado a nanossatélites: Programa NANOSATC-BR, desenvolvimento de CubeSats [Orbit and space mechanics study applied to nanosatellites: NANOSATC-BRProgram, CubeSat development]**<br>
32º Jornada Acadêmica Integrada, Santa Maria, Brazil

- Mantovani, L. Q., Couto, A. P., Slongo, A. G., Farias, T. T., Durão, O. S. C., Schuch, N. J. (2016).<br>
**Otimização de recursos em missões espaciais aplicado ao projeto NANOSATCBR2 [Resource optimization in space missions applied to the NANOSATC-BR2 project]**<br>
31º Jornada Acadêmica Integrada, Santa Maria, Brazil

## Technical reports

- Mantovani, L. Q.; Burger, E. E. ; Schuch, N. J. (2019). NANOSATC-BR2, Environmental Test Plan.
- Mantovani, L. Q.; Souza, B. F. R. ; Burger, E. E. ; Schuch, N. J. (2019). Initialization instructions for the NANOSATC-BR1 engineering model.
